abstract: Fetches reports for search terms within a campaign.
overview:
## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch reports for search terms in your campaigns. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingSearchTerm] for [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] operators and field values to filter results with a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

The limit for search term-level reports is 10 impressions. Search term-level reports only support a `timeZone` value of `ORTZ`. The `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] specifies fields to sort the records list by `ASCENDING` or `DESCENDING`. All [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingSearchTerm] fields are available to the `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

### Payload example: Get search term-level reports

# Get Search Term-Level Reports

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches reports for search terms within a campaign.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to fetch reports for search terms in your campaigns. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingSearchTerm] for [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] operators and field values to filter results with a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

The limit for search term-level reports is 10 impressions. Search term-level reports only support a `timeZone` value of `ORTZ`. The `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] specifies fields to sort the records list by `ASCENDING` or `DESCENDING`. All [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ReportingSearchTerm] fields are available to the `orderBy` [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector].

### Payload example: Get search term-level reports



## Reports Endpoints

- **Get Campaign-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for campaigns.
- **Get Ad Group-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for ad groups within a campaign.
- **Get Keyword-Level Reports**: Fetches reports for targeting keywords within a campaign.
- **Get Keyword-Level within Ad Group Reports**: Fetches reports for targeting keywords within an ad group.
- **Get Search Term-Level within Ad Group Reports**: Fetches reports for search terms within an ad group.
- **Get Ad-Level Reports**: Fetches ad performance data within a campaign.
